name: bluritout
description: Privacy-focused video anonymization — blur faces and license plates locally.
author: Shubhanshu

scripts.dist:win: node scripts/build-engine.js && tsc --project src/electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && tsc -b && vite build --configLoader native && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/build-engine.js && tsc --project src/electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && tsc -b && vite build --configLoader native && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:linux: node scripts/build-engine.js && tsc --project src/electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && tsc -b && vite build --configLoader native && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.dist:win:release: node scripts/build-engine.js --spec worker.release.spec && tsc --project src/electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && tsc -b && vite build --configLoader native && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:mac:release: node scripts/build-engine.js --spec worker.release.spec && tsc --project src/electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && tsc -b && vite build --configLoader native && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:linux:release: node scripts/build-engine.js --spec worker.release.spec && tsc --project src/electron/tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.cjs','dist-electron/preload.cjs')" && tsc -b && vite build --configLoader native && electron-builder --linux --x64
